title: Luke's Vanilla+
description: A Vanilla Plus Modpack that is entirely client side, focusing on the visual and immersive aspects of minecraft. Compatible on any 1.21.8 server or realm.
body:
## The Minecraft you love with enhanced visuals and quality of life!
 ...all while being entirely client side and Vanilla server compatible!

![in-game screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebf77e7dd86616b973f6ec6483cddcb21b4cdf1c_0.webp)
 
### Key Features:

- New Animations!
- Improved Visuals!
- Optimizations!
- Quality of Life!

_Not recommended on any competitive servers like Hypixel_

**If you run into any issues or have any suggestions, you may reach out to me on Discord @lukeinstew**

<details>
<summary>Mod List</summary>

- 3D Skin Layers
- Better Mount HUD
- Better Third Person
- Blur+
- Chat Heads
- Chunks Fade In
- Completionist's Index
- Continuity
- Effect Timer Plus
- Entity Culling
- FerriteCore
- Held Item Info
- Hold My Items
- Iris Shaders
- LambDynamicLights
- Mod Menu
- Model Gap Fix
- More Culling
- Not Enough Animations
- Particle Effects
- Particle Rain
- Pick Up Notifier
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Subtle Effects
- Visuality
- Wavey Capes
- ...and many libraries, configs, and utilites

</details>

<details>
<summary>Resource Packs</summary>

- Reimagined
- Fresh Animations
- Fresh Moves
- ...and more!

</details>



<details>
<summary>Known Issues:
</summary>

- Player model is visually bugged if opening inventory with a shield equipped
(if this bothers you, disable the "Fresh Moves" resource pack)

</details>
